about.heading: About us
body: Enjoy seasonal cuisine, craft beers, and live music at Brewsters in downtown Petaluma. Family-friendly outdoor dining with local ingredients and vibrant vibes.

services.title: Dine-in
services.description: Seasonal plates and craft beer in our open-air beer garden in downtown Petaluma.

services.title: Takeout & to-go
services.description: Call ahead or order to go — the same scratch kitchen, ready when you are.

services.title: Catering
services.description: Let us cater your next event with seasonal food and local beer on tap.

services.title: Private dining
services.description: Book the beer garden for parties, rehearsals, and group celebrations.

items.title: Catering
items.description: Let us cater your next event with seasonal food and local beer on tap.

items.title: Private dining
items.description: Book the beer garden for parties, rehearsals, and group celebrations.

items.a: You'll find us at 229 Water Street Petaluma, CA, 94952.
Hours can vary — give us a call at (707) 981-8330 and we'll let you know when we're open.
We proudly serve Petaluma, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at (707) 981-8330 — we're glad to help.
